title: Traveling Without a Plan
content: Unlike most of her previous vacations, Sophia decided not to create a detailed itinerary for this trip. She booked only her first few nights of accommodation and allowed the rest of the journey to develop naturally. Some days she followed recommendations from locals, while other days she simply wandered until something interesting caught her attention. Although the lack of structure occasionally created uncertainty, it also led to unexpected discoveries and spontaneous adventures. Sophia enjoyed the freedom of making decisions day by day. The experience changed her perspective on how travel could be enjoyed.
